headlines.description: — The Buffalo Bills earned their first playoff victory in a quarter-century on Saturday when Josh Allen threw two touchdown passes, scored another rushing, and Micah Hyde batted down Philip Rivers' desperation pass for a 27-24 win over the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills beat Colts 27-24 for 1st playoff win in 25 years

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Seattle Seahawks

headlines.description: — A lot of Cam Akers churning yards on the ground and mostly a great Rams defense has Los Angeles moving on in the NFC playoffs at the expense of division-foe Seattle.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rams get better of division rivals, toppling Seahawks 30-20

headlines.description: — New team, same swashbuckling playoff success for Tom Brady.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady outduels Heinicke, leads Buccaneers past Washington
